📄 Inyandiko z'Imitungo (Documents)
💡 Shyiramo inyandiko kuri Google Drive cyangwa Dropbox (Public link). Inyandiko ntizohererewe muri internet niba utazishyize.
📍 Aho Imitungo Iri Hafi (Coordinates) — Ntibisabwa — Ikoresha Google Maps
💡 Shakisha coordinates kuri maps.google.com → Kanda hejuru y'aho imitungo iri → Kopi umubare ugaragara munsi. Urugero: -1.9441, 30.1044
🔐 Admin Mode — YouTube URL + Image URLs
📸 Shyiramo amafoto y'imitungo (JPEG, PNG — max 5MB buri ifoto)
💡 Amafoto azabikwa kuri imgbb.com ubuntu. Uzabona URL nyuma yo kuranga.

Ibikorwa by'Urubuga

Byose Uhereye ku Gushakisha Kugeza ku Isoko

Ntugomba gukoresha ibikoresho byinshi bitandukanye — shakisha, suzuma, wishyure, kandi ukurikirane byose uri kuri KOMISIYONERI.

Smart Listings

Amafoto, videos, ingendo za 3D, n'amakuru yose y'imitungo mu rubuga rumwe rizewe.

Shakisha →

Virtual Tours 3D/VR

Reba inzu mu 3D cyangwa VR utajya ahandi — ukoresha telefoni cyangwa mudasobwa yawe.

Gerageza 3D →

E-Contracts & Digital Payments

Amasezerano ya digitale ahari ubu. Kwishyura online biri hafi kuboneka.

Menya Byinshi →

Market Analytics

Ibipimo nyakuri biva ku mitungo yemejwe — igiciro/m² ku karere, ubwoko bw'imitungo.

Reba Analytics →

Agent Dashboard

Dashboard ya abakomisiyoneri — gutwara imitungo, gukurikirana abakiliya, n'amafaranga y'komisiyoni.

Injira →

Live Chat & Support

Ganira na abakomisiyoneri na support yacu ku gihe — vuba, neza, mu Kinyarwanda cyangwa Icyongereza.

Tangira Kuvugana →
Impamvu Watwitirira

Impamvu Rwandans Bizera KOMISIYONERI

Imitungo Yose Igenzurwa

Buri kintu cyoherejwe kirasuzumwa n'itsinda ryacu mbere yo kwerekanwa ku rubuga — nta bihuha, nta gukoreshwa nabi.

NOHERI AI Assistant

Umufasha wa AI uboneka igihe cyose kugira ngo agufashe gushakisha no gusubiza ibibazo byawe.

Byanditswe mu Ndimi Zombi

Urubuga rwose rukora mu Kinyarwanda no mu Cyongereza, rugera ku karere kose 30 ka Rwanda.

Agent Asubiza Vuba

Saba agent uwo ari we wese, akubwiza mu masaa 2 gusa — kuri telefoni, WhatsApp cyangwa live chat.

Uko Bikorwa

Intambwe 4 Gusa

1

Iyandikishe Ubuntu

Fungura konti yawe mu masegonda — nta mafaranga asabwa gutangira.

2

Shakisha Imitungo

Shakisha imitungo ukoresha filters, AI, cyangwa agent.

3

Huza n'Agent

Umukomisiyoneri wacu azagufasha mu biganiro no kugenzura imitungo.

4

Soza Amasezerano

Soza igurishwa ukoresha e-contract no kwishyura bwizewe kuri platform.

Ibivugwa n'Abakiliya

★★★★★

Utumiwa Bwacu

Ni nde ukoresha KOMISIYONERI?

Nyir'Imitungo

Ufite inzu cyangwa ubutaka ushaka kugurisha? Andika kuri platform yacu ubuntu ubone abakiliya benshi muri akarere ka Rwanda.

Tangira Gugurishia →

Umushaka Inzu

Ushaka kugura cyangwa gukodesha inzu? Shakisha mu mitungo yanditswe mu Rwanda, n'AI iragufasha guhitamo nziza.

Tangira Gushakisha →

Umukomisiyoneri

Ufite ubuhanga mu nganda y'imitungo? Iyandikishe nk'umukomisiyoneri wacu ubone abakiliya barenze kandi uhabwe komisiyoni nziza.

Iyandikishe nk'Agent →
Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa

Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa

Ese gushakisha imitungo birihombo?

Yes, searching and browsing every listing is completely free — no account needed to start looking.

Ese nabona nte niba imitungo ari iy'ukuri?

Every submitted listing goes through admin review before it's marked Approved and shown publicly — nothing goes live unchecked.

Nakwandika nte imitungo yanjye?

Click 'List Property' in the top navigation or the homepage quick actions, fill in your property details, and our team reviews it shortly after.

Agent asaba angahe?

There's no charge to request an agent. Agents are only paid a commission once a deal closes — never upfront.

Ni ryari agent azansubiza?

Once you submit a request through 'Find an Agent', an agent in your area responds within 2 hours.

Tangira Ubu Ubu

Iyandikishe Ubuntu — Ubu!

Iyandikishe kuri KOMISIYONERI ubone inzu yawe y'inzozi mu Rwanda. Nta mafaranga asabwa kugira konti.

👔 Agents wa KOMISIYONERI

Kuba Agent — Jya Uhembwe 40%

Fata inzu ikigurishwa mu gace kawe, uyishyireho platform — iyo yagurishijwe uhembwa 40% ya commission yose. Nta mushahara wa buri kwezi — ukora, ugira.

🏢 Sosiyete yacu

Abo Turi Bo

KOMISIYONERI Connectpro Services ni sosiyete y'imitungo ikomoka mu Rwanda, ihuza abantu n'imitungo itimurika mu buryo bworoshye kandi bwizewe.

🎯

Intego Yacu

Gukora kugira ngo buri wese abashe kugura, kugurisha, no gukodesha inzu mu Rwanda mu buryo bworoshye, burambuye kandi bwizewe.

🔭

Icyo Tutekereza

Kuba platform y'imitungo nziza kuruta izindi mu Africa y'Iburasirazuba — aho ikoranabuhanga rihuza abantu n'amazu yabo y'itorero.

💎

Indangagaciro

Ubunyamahanga, ubwizerane, no kugira impinduka — ni wo murongo tukurikira buri munsi.

🔒 Amabwiriza

Politiki y'Ubucungezi bw'Amakuru

Itariki yatangiye gukurikizwa: Mutarama 2025

1. Amakuru Tukusanya / Information We Collect

Dusanya amakuru akurikira iyo ukoresheje KOMISIYONERI:

• Amakuru y'umwirondoro — izina, imeri, nimero ya telefoni', 'error' iyo uyandikisha.
• Amakuru y'isoko — imitungo washakishije, wayifunguriye, cyangwa wayasubiriyeho.
• Amakuru y'ikigo — ubwoko bwa browser, aderesi ya IP, na OS.
• Amakuru utuzanira — imitungo wishyize kurubuga, ibitekerezo, cyangwa ubutumwa bwohereje.

2. Uko Dukoresha Amakuru Yawe / How We Use Your Information

• Gucunga konti yawe no gutanga serivisi
• Kohereza imenyesha (email, WhatsApp) bijyanye na gahunda yawe
• Kunoza platform — isesengura ry'imikorere
• Kuzuza inshingano z'amategeko

3. Ababona Amakuru Yawe / Third Parties

Dukoresha serivisi zikurikira zifite amakuru yawe:

• Firebase (Google) — imbuga yo kubika amakuru na konti
• EmailJS — kohereza email z'imenyesha
• Google Analytics — isesengura ry'imikorere y'urubuga (amakuru atavuga uwo ari we)
• Google Maps — kwerekana aho imitungo iri

4. Uburenganzira Bwawe / Your Rights

Ufite uburenganzira bwo:

• Gusaba amakuru yawe yose
• Gusaba ko amakuru yawe asibwa
• Guhagarika ugukoreshwa kw'amakuru yawe
• Gusaba guhindura amakuru atunganye

Kugira ngo ubone uburenganzira bwawe, twandikire: info.komisiyoneri.net@gmail.com

5. Kubika Amakuru / Data Retention

Dufite amakuru yawe nk'uko konti yawe ikiriho. Konti iyo yasibwe, amakuru asibwa mu gihe cy'iminsi 30.

6. Twandikire / Contact

KOMISIYONERI Connectpro Services Ltd
Kigali, Rwanda
info.komisiyoneri.net@gmail.com
+250 783 177 254

📋 Amabwiriza

Amabwiriza y'Ikoreshwa

Itariki yatangiye gukurikizwa: Mutarama 2025

1. Kwemera Amabwiriza / Acceptance of Terms

Iyo ukoresheje KOMISIYONERI, wemera amabwiriza yose akubiyemo hano. Niba udashyigikiye amabwiriza yose, reka gukomeza gukoresha platform.

2. Serivisi Dutanga / Services Provided

KOMISIYONERI itanga:

• Ishusho ya digital yo gushakisha no gutanga imitungo
• Ikoranabuhanga ryo guhuza abantu n'abajyanama bemewe
• AI Analytics — isesengura ry'isoko ry'imitungo mu Rwanda
• Virtual Tours 3D n'amafoto y'imitungo

3. Inshingano z'Abakoresha / User Responsibilities

Ukoresheje KOMISIYONERI, wiyemeza:

• Gutanga amakuru y'ukuri ku mitungo ushyira ku rubuga
• Kutarema na nimero ya telefoni ya mugenzi wawe utatumyeho
• Kutakoresha platform mu buryo butemewe cyangwa bwangiriza abandi
• Kwubahiriza amategeko y'u Rwanda

4. Imitungo Itemewe / Prohibited Content

Birabujijwe gushyira ku rubuga:

• Amafoto y'imitungo idahari cyangwa itarize
• Ibiciro by'ibinyoma
• Gutangaza imitungo itamenywa n'inzego z'u Rwanda
• Ibikubiyemo ikiganiro cy'urwango cyangwa ivangura

5. Uburenganzira bw'Ubwenge / Intellectual Property

Ibikorwa byose bya KOMISIYONERI — izina, logo, na code — ni uburenganzira bwa KOMISIYONERI Connectpro Services Ltd. Uburenganzira bwo gukoresha amafoto washyize ku rubuga burakubahirizwa.

6. Uburinzi bw'Inshingano / Limitation of Liability

KOMISIYONERI ni aho abantu bahurana — ntitwishingira ku makuru atangwa n'abakoresha. Abasoresha basubira mu rukiko rw'igihugu cya Rwanda iyo hari impaka.

7. Amategeko Akurikizwa / Governing Law

Amabwiriza yose akurikizwa hakurikijwe amategeko y'u Rwanda.

8. Twandikire / Contact

KOMISIYONERI Connectpro Services Ltd
Kigali, Rwanda
info.komisiyoneri.net@gmail.com
+250 783 177 254

AMASEZERANO Y'AGENT — KOMISIYONERI

Njyewe Agent wa KOMISIYONERI, nemeza ibi:
✓ Nzakora mu buryo bwizewe kandi bwiza
✓ Nzasubiza clients mu masaa 24
✓ Nta mafaranga nzasaba clients imbere yo kugurisha
✓ Commission: 40% ya commission yose injiye
✓ Nzashyira amakuru y'ukuri gusa kuri platform
✓ Niba nkora nabi, KOMISIYONERI ishobora kunsezerera
⚠️ Deposit ya 50,000 RWF izasabwa nyuma — ibikwa kugeza amasezerano arangira neza.
🏠 Saba Agent Wawe

Uzuza hasi — agent wo mu gace kawe azakuhamagara mu masaa 2!

⚡ Agent asubiza mu masaa 2 gusa
